affinity._comment: Affinity Studio local MCP (beta). Affinity must be open + Edit>Settings>MCP all enabled. Official help: affinity.studio/help/ai-connector-setup

indesign-uxp._comment: PRIMARY InDesign path (Windows). Requires: (1) bridge running on 19300/19301 (2) UXP plugin loaded + Connected in InDesign. See tools/layout-mcp/SETUP.md

indesign-exec._comment: Fallback COM/JSX runner. Currently COM returns Server execution failed on this PC — keep for retry after InDesign restart / Adobe repair. Prefer indesign-uxp.
